address.Address: No. 8-1-300, 1, Ambedkar Nagar, Shaikpet, Hyderabad, Telangana 500008, India

school_address.streetAddress: No. 8-1-300, 1, Ambedkar Nagar, Shaikpet, Hyderabad, Telangana 500008, India

reviews.author: Renu Sharma
reviews.review_body: I couldn't be happier with the education my child is receiving at International School Shaikpet. The teachers are incredibly dedicated and genuinely care about each student's success. The staff also focus on extracurricular activities, and I am highly grateful for my child's growth and development. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Sam Ali
reviews.review_body: As a student here, it is horrible. One time in my previous class a boy ate a scale (ruler) and I told the class teacher she did nothing. Don’t get me started at the bathroom, The boys bathroom smell comes all the way in the building. They don’t allowed Non veg like chicken. The school is one of the worst schools I’ve ever been to. Also I haven’t played Games in 6 months. The bus children shout and scream even Hyd traffic police shouted at them but the school does nothing. Truly The Worst school in Hyderabad.

reviews.author: Wajida Begum
reviews.review_body: Best education in all telangana is international school

reviews.author: Abdul Quddus
reviews.review_body: Worst admin team here, they didn't even bother to reply to the emails and upon enquiry for admission status there's no one to attend, very poor administration here. The admin incharge mam said "we don't reply to all emails", then what was the purpose of sharing the email ID and asking to share the children and parents details?? Very disappointing I don't recommend this school at all.

reviews.author: Siva Krishna Kota
reviews.review_body: Good school which gives equal importance to education and sports. Values are very important for a child to grow n the school believes this.

reviews.author: Remo Rahaman
reviews.review_body: International school is one of the best  schools in Hyderabad. Faculty staff are mostly very approachable and caring. My son loves his class teacher and they have genuine bonding which is very rare nowadays. Fees are moderate and transparent. Overall, very good atmosphere, well supported by honorable principal, vice principal and management.
